46"},"item_type":1},{"video_data":{"vid":"7600237119100963864","cover":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/db792664c59b02510bf7f8908f29c5af~tplv-snk2bdmkp8-super-reso-double-5-v2:600:0.heic?lk3s=ae45642e&x-expires=1779008524&x-signature=gFBLPIFD34oNR5s4kBehxSv4cOc%3D","duration":13044,"title":"玄幻：一脉相承，主打的就是强势","video_desc":"穿越玄幻世界，徐安山成了万剑宗的“废物峰主”，无灵根无修为，却藏着五年前绑定的抢劫系统。面对青山峰主的刁难、沧澜王朝的挑衅、妖修的入侵，他背靠护犊子的师尊梅及笄、师祖吴仁德，带着百依百顺的弟子们，以“家师梅及笄”为口头禅，仗势凌人横扫强敌。收美女弟子、揽绝色道侣，从宗门小比到仙域争锋，一路嚣张到底，书写最爽修仙传奇！","series_id":"7600234034261658648","episode":true,"vertical":false,"content_type":1004,"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"94349567737\",\"request_id\":\"20260318170203C18646DFD9F282C0B849\",\"rank\":\"10\",\"normal_session_id\":\"0392ea3e-eb2f-4779-9b25-093ea46d8405\",\"cold_start_session_id\":\"cd4b8999-2a25-44d0-8d8c-a56213afb93d\"}","recommend_group_id":"7600234034261658648","show_play_cnt":true,"play_cnt":31237,"book_exist":false,"copyright":"tomatotv","sub_title":"时空之旅·全164集","score":"8.3","use_video_model":true,"episode_cnt":164,"search_high_light":{"title":{"text":"玄幻：一脉相承，主打的就是强势","rich_text":"玄幻：一脉相承，主打的就是强势","high_light_position":[[0,2]]}},"video_platform":3,"disable_play":false,"category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":792,\"name\":\"时空之旅\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://categorySearch?categoryId=792&categoryName=时空之旅&genreType=130&gender=2&source=detail\"}]","color_dominate":"#282020","video_detail":{"series_id":7600234034261658648,"followed":false,"series_play_cnt":31237,"episode_right_text":"共164集","series_title":"玄幻：一脉相承，主打的就是强势","series_intro":"穿越玄幻世界，徐安山成了万剑宗的“废物峰主”，无灵根无修为，却藏着五年前绑定的抢劫系统。面对青山峰主的刁难、沧澜王朝的挑衅、妖修的入侵，他背靠护犊子的师尊梅及笄、师祖吴仁德，带着百依百顺的弟子们，以“家师梅及笄”为口头禅，仗势凌人横扫强敌。收美女弟子、揽绝色道侣，从宗门小比到仙域争锋，一路嚣张到底，书写最爽修仙传奇！","episode":true,"episode_cnt":164,"series_status":1,"series_cover":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/db792664c59b02510bf7f8908f29c5af~tplv-snk2bdmkp8-super-reso-double-5-v2:600:0.heic?lk3s=ae45642e&x-expires=1779008524&x-signature=gFBLPIFD34oNR5s4kBehxSv4c
